  <script>
    // ── Mermaid init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    mermaid.initialize({ startOnLoad: false, theme: 'dark', securityLevel: 'loose',
      themeVariables: { darkMode: true, background: '#0a1220', primaryColor: '#10B981',
        primaryTextColor: '#e4e8f0', lineColor: '#5a6478', edgeLabelBackground: '#0a1220' }
    });

    // ── Supabase REST client ──────────────────────────────────────────
    let SB_URL = sessionStorage.getItem('sedrex_admin_url') || '';
    let SB_KEY = sessionStorage.getItem('sedrex_admin_key') || '';

    async function sbSelect(table, extraFilter = '', limit = 200, order = '') {
      const parts = [`select=*`, limit ? `limit=${limit}` : '', order ? `order=${order}` : '', extraFilter].filter(Boolean);
      const url = `${SB_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?${parts.join('&')}`;
      console.log(`[ADMIN] → ${table}`, url);
      const r = await fetch(url, {
        headers: { apikey: SB_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SB_KEY}`, 'Accept': 'application/json' }
      });
      const text = await r.text();
      if (!r.ok) {
        let msg = text;
        try { const j = JSON.parse(text); msg = j.message || j.hint || j.code || text; } catch {}
        const fullErr = `${table} [${r.status}]: ${msg}`;
        console.error(`[ADMIN] ✗ ${fullErr}`);
        throw new Error(fullErr);
      }
      try {
        const data = JSON.parse(text) ?? [];
        console.log(`[ADMIN] ✓ ${table}: ${Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 1} rows`);
        return Array.isArray(data) ? data : [data];
      } catch { return []; }
    }

    async function sbCount(table) {
      const r = await fetch(`${SB_URL}/rest/v1/${table}?select=id&limit=1`, {
        headers: { apikey: SB_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SB_KEY}`, Prefer: 'count=exact' }
      });
      return parseInt(r.headers.get('content-range')?.split('/')[1] || '0', 10);
    }

    // ── Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function login() {
      const url = document.getElementById('sb-url').value.trim().replace(/\/$/, '');
      const key = document.getElementById('sb-key').value.trim();
      const err = document.getElementById('auth-err');
      if (!url || !key) { err.textContent = 'Both fields required.'; return; }
      SB_URL = url; SB_KEY = key;
      try {
        const r = await fetch(`${SB_URL}/rest/v1/profiles?select=id&limit=1`, {
          headers: { apikey: SB_KEY, Authorization: `Bearer ${SB_KEY}`, 'Accept': 'application/json' }
        });
        if (!r.ok) {
          const txt = await r.text();
          let msg = txt;
          try { msg = JSON.parse(txt).message || txt; } catch {}
          throw new Error(`Connection failed (${r.status}): ${msg}`);
        }
        console.log(`[ADMIN] Connected to ${SB_URL}`);
        sessionStorage.setItem('sedrex_admin_url', SB_URL);
        sessionStorage.setItem('sedrex_admin_key', SB_KEY);
        err.textContent = '';
        document.getElementById('auth-screen').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('app').classList.add('visible');
        loadAll();
        setInterval(loadAll, 60000);
      } catch (e) { err.textContent = e.message; }
    }

    function logout() {
      sessionStorage.removeItem('sedrex_admin_url');
      sessionStorage.removeItem('sedrex_admin_key');
      location.reload();
    }

    window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      const u = sessionStorage.getItem('sedrex_admin_url');
      const k = sessionStorage.getItem('sedrex_admin_key');
      if (u && k) {
        document.getElementById('sb-url').value = u;
        document.getElementById('sb-key').value = k;
        login();
      }
    });

    // ── State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    let _users = [], _platform = [], _queries = [], _sessions = [], _convos = [],
        _artifacts = [], _images = [], _diagrams = [], _genCode = [], _events = [],
        _prefs = [], _metrics = [], _messages = [], _usersMap = {}, _fetchStatus = [];
    let _currentTab = 'overview', _currentModalTab = 'overview', _selectedUser = null;
    let _userQueries = [], _userSessions = [], _userImages = [], _userDiagrams = [],
        _userGenCode = [], _userPrefs = null;
    let _savedModalHtml = '';
    let _userSearch = '', _search = '';

    const fmt = {
      num: n => (n ?? 0).toLocaleString(),
      k: n => n >= 1000 ? `${(n / 1000).toFixed(1)}k` : String(n ?? 0),
      date: s => s ? new Date(s).toLocaleString() : '—',
      ago: s => {
        if (!s) return '—';
        const d = Date.now() - new Date(s).getTime();
        if (d < 60000) return 'just now';
        if (d < 3600000) return `${Math.floor(d / 60000)}m ago`;
        if (d < 86400000) return `${Math.floor(d / 3600000)}h ago`;
        return `${Math.floor(d / 86400000)}d ago`;
      },
      mins: n => n >= 60 ? `${Math.floor(n / 60)}h ${Math.floor(n % 60)}m` : `${Math.round(n ?? 0)}m`,
      bytes: b => b > 1048576 ? `${(b / 1048576).toFixed(1)}MB` : b > 1024 ? `${(b / 1024).toFixed(0)}KB` : `${b ?? 0}B`,
    };

    const TIER_CLR = { free: 'var(--muted)', pro: 'var(--accent)', unlimited: 'var(--green)' };
    const INT_CLR  = { coding: 'var(--blue)', reasoning: 'var(--purple)', live: 'var(--green)', general: 'var(--muted)' };
    const EVT_CLR  = {
      message_sent: 'var(--green)', query_completed: 'var(--accent)', artifact_created: 'var(--blue)',
      image_generated: 'var(--purple)', diagram_generated: '#f59e0b', session_start: 'var(--green)',
      session_end: 'var(--muted)', upgrade: '#f59e0b', error: 'var(--red)',
    };

    // ── Load all data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function loadAll() {
      const c = document.getElementById('content');
      if (!_users.length) c.innerHTML = '<div class="loading"><div class="spinner"></div>Loading all Supabase data…</div>';

      // Named fetches so we can show per-table status
      const FETCHES = [
        { key: 'profiles',           args: ['profiles',          '', 1000, 'created_at.desc']   },
        { key: 'platform_daily',     args: ['platform_daily',    '', 30,   'date.desc']          },
        { key: 'user_query_log',     args: ['user_query_log',    '', 300,  'created_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'user_sessions',      args: ['user_sessions',     '', 300,  'started_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'conversations',      args: ['conversations',     '', 300,  'last_modified.desc'] },
        { key: 'artifacts',          args: ['artifacts',         '', 200,  'created_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'user_stats',         args: ['user_stats',        '', 1000]                       },
        { key: 'generated_images',   args: ['generated_images',  '', 300,  'created_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'generated_diagrams', args: ['generated_diagrams','', 200,  'created_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'generated_code',     args: ['generated_code',    '', 200,  'created_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'user_events',        args: ['user_events',       '', 300,  'created_at.desc']    },
        { key: 'user_preferences',   args: ['user_preferences',  '', 500]                        },
        { key: 'user_daily_metrics', args: ['user_daily_metrics','', 300,  'date.desc']          },
        { key: 'messages',           args: ['messages',          '', 300,  'timestamp.desc']     },
      ];

      try {
        const results = await Promise.allSettled(FETCHES.map(f => sbSelect(...f.args)));

        // Build status for debugging
        _fetchStatus = FETCHES.map((f, i) => ({
          key:   f.key,
          ok:    results[i].status === 'fulfilled',
          count: results[i].status === 'fulfilled' ? (results[i].value?.length ?? 0) : 0,
          error: results[i].status === 'rejected'  ? results[i].reason?.message : null,
        }));

        const safe = (i) => results[i].status === 'fulfilled' ? (results[i].value ?? []) : [];

        const profiles  = safe(0);
        _platform       = safe(1);
        _queries        = safe(2);
        _sessions       = safe(3);
        _convos         = safe(4);
        _artifacts      = safe(5);
        const statsArr  = safe(6);
        _images         = safe(7);
        _diagrams       = safe(8);
        _genCode        = safe(9);
        _events         = safe(10);
        _prefs          = safe(11);
        _metrics        = safe(12);
        _messages       = safe(13);

        // Build email lookup map from profiles
        _usersMap = profiles.reduce((m, p) => ({ ...m, [p.id]: p.email ?? p.id }), {});

        // Build conversation → user_id map (messages don't have user_id directly)
        window._convoUserMap = _convos.reduce((m, c) => ({ ...m, [c.id]: c.user_id }), {});

        // Build stats lookup: user_id → stats row
        const statsMap = statsArr.reduce((m, s) => ({ ...m, [s.user_id]: s }), {});

        // Count active sessions per user
        const activeMap = {};
        _sessions.filter(s => s.is_active).forEach(s => {
          activeMap[s.user_id] = (activeMap[s.user_id] || 0) + 1;
        });

        // Build avg session minutes per user (from all sessions)
        const sessionTotals = {};
        _sessions.forEach(s => {
          if (!sessionTotals[s.user_id]) sessionTotals[s.user_id] = { sum: 0, cnt: 0 };
          sessionTotals[s.user_id].sum += (s.duration_seconds || 0) / 60;
          sessionTotals[s.user_id].cnt += 1;
        });

        // Build today's queries count per user from user_daily_metrics
        const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
        const todayMap = {};
        _metrics.filter(m => m.date === today).forEach(m => {
          todayMap[m.user_id] = m.queries_made || 0;
        });

        // Merge profiles + user_stats into unified _users array
        _users = profiles.map(p => {
          const s = statsMap[p.id] || {};
          const st = sessionTotals[p.id] || { sum: 0, cnt: 0 };
          const totalIn  = s.total_input_tokens  || 0;
          const totalOut = s.total_output_tokens || 0;
          return {
            user_id:               p.id,
            email:                 p.email || '—',
            tier:                  p.tier  || 'free',
            is_admin:              p.is_admin  || false,
            is_banned:             p.is_banned || false,
            last_seen_at:          p.last_seen_at,
            signup_at:             p.created_at,
            timezone:              p.timezone,
            country:               p.country,
            city:                  p.city,
            device_type:           p.device_type,
            browser:               p.browser,
            signup_source:         p.signup_source,
            // stats
            total_messages:        s.total_messages        || 0,
            monthly_messages:      s.monthly_messages      || 0,
            total_input_tokens:    totalIn,
            total_output_tokens:   totalOut,
            lifetime_tokens:       totalIn + totalOut,
            total_conversations:   s.total_conversations   || 0,
            total_artifacts:       s.total_artifacts       || 0,
            total_code_requests:   s.total_code_requests   || 0,
            total_live_requests:   s.total_live_requests   || 0,
            total_reasoning_requests: s.total_reasoning_requests || 0,
            streak_days:           s.streak_days           || 0,
            first_message_at:      s.first_message_at,
            last_message_at:       s.last_message_at,
            // session derived
            total_sessions:        p.total_sessions || st.cnt || 0,
            avg_session_minutes:   st.cnt > 0 ? st.sum / st.cnt : 0,
            active_sessions:       activeMap[p.id] || 0,
            queries_today:         todayMap[p.id]  || 0,
          };
        });

        // Today's platform totals — aggregate from user_daily_metrics if platform_daily is empty
        if (!_platform.length) {
          const todayRows = _metrics.filter(m => m.date === today);
          if (todayRows.length) {
            const agg = todayRows.reduce((acc, m) => {
              acc.total_queries     += m.queries_made   || 0;
              acc.total_tokens      += m.total_tokens   || 0;
              acc.gemini_queries    += m.gemini_queries  || 0;
              acc.claude_queries    += m.claude_queries  || 0;
              acc.openai_queries    += m.openai_queries  || 0;
              acc.coding_queries    += m.coding_queries  || 0;
              acc.reasoning_queries += m.reasoning_queries || 0;
              acc.live_queries      += m.live_queries    || 0;
              acc.general_queries   += m.general_queries || 0;
              acc.artifacts_created += m.artifacts_created || 0;
              acc.good_feedback     += m.good_feedback   || 0;
              acc.bad_feedback      += m.bad_feedback    || 0;
              acc.regenerations     += m.regenerations   || 0;
              acc.active_users      += 1;
              return acc;
            }, {
              date: today, active_users: 0, total_queries: 0, total_tokens: 0,
              gemini_queries: 0, claude_queries: 0, openai_queries: 0,
              coding_queries: 0, reasoning_queries: 0, live_queries: 0, general_queries: 0,
              artifacts_created: 0, good_feedback: 0, bad_feedback: 0, regenerations: 0,
            });
            _platform = [agg];
          }
        } else {
          // Enrich platform_daily rows with per-intent breakdown from user_daily_metrics
          _platform = _platform.map(pd => {
            const dayRows = _metrics.filter(m => m.date === pd.date);
            const agg = dayRows.reduce((acc, m) => ({
              coding_queries:    acc.coding_queries    + (m.coding_queries    || 0),
              reasoning_queries: acc.reasoning_queries + (m.reasoning_queries || 0),
              live_queries:      acc.live_queries      + (m.live_queries      || 0),
              general_queries:   acc.general_queries   + (m.general_queries   || 0),
              regenerations:     acc.regenerations     + (m.regenerations     || 0),
            }), { coding_queries: 0, reasoning_queries: 0, live_queries: 0, general_queries: 0, regenerations: 0 });
            return { ...pd, ...agg };
          });
        }

        // Update nav badges
        document.getElementById('cnt-users').textContent     = _users.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-convos').textContent    = _convos.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-messages').textContent  = _messages.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-queries').textContent   = _queries.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-sessions').textContent  = _sessions.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-artifacts').textContent = _artifacts.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-gencode').textContent   = _genCode.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-images').textContent    = _images.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-diagrams').textContent  = _diagrams.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-prefs').textContent     = _prefs.length;
        document.getElementById('cnt-events').textContent    = _events.length;

        const liveCount = _users.filter(u => u.active_sessions > 0).length;
        document.getElementById('live-count').textContent = liveCount;
        document.getElementById('live-indicator').classList.toggle('live-hidden', liveCount === 0);
        document.getElementById('refresh-time').textContent = fmt.ago(new Date().toISOString());

        const totalLoaded = _fetchStatus.reduce((n, s) => n + s.count, 0);
        const hasErrors = _fetchStatus.some(s => !s.ok);
        console.log(`[ADMIN] Total rows loaded: ${totalLoaded}, Errors: ${_fetchStatus.filter(s=>!s.ok).length}`);
        if (totalLoaded === 0) {
          console.warn('[ADMIN] ALL TABLES RETURNED 0 ROWS — auto-opening diagnostic');
          setTimeout(() => runDiagnostic(), 400);
        }

        renderTab(_currentTab);
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('[ADMIN] loadAll crash:', e);
        c.innerHTML = `<div class="loading" style="color:var(--red)">⚠ ${e.message}<br><br><button type="button" class="btn-sm" onclick="loadAll()">Retry</button></div>`;
      }
    }

    // ── Tab switching ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function switchTab(tab) {
      _currentTab = tab;
      document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.tab === tab));
      renderTab(tab);
    }

    function renderTab(tab) {
      const c = document.getElementById('content');
      const renders = {
        overview:      renderOverview,
        users:         renderUsers,
        conversations: renderConvos,
        messages:      renderMessages,
        queries:       renderQueries,
        artifacts:     renderArtifacts,
        gencode:       renderGenCode,
        images:        renderImages,
        diagrams:      renderDiagrams,
        preferences:   renderPreferences,
        events:        renderEvents,
        sessions:      renderSessions,
        metrics:       renderMetrics,
      };
      c.innerHTML = renders[tab] ? renders[tab]() : '<div class="empty">Tab not found</div>';
      // Run mermaid on diagram tab
      if (tab === 'diagrams') scheduleMermaid();
      // Run hljs on gencode tab
      if (tab === 'gencode' || tab === 'artifacts') scheduleHljs();
    }

    // ── Diagnostic test ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function runDiagnostic() {
      const overlay = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">🔍 Supabase Connection Diagnostic</div>
      <button type="button" class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="diag-body">
      <div class="loading"><div class="spinner"></div>Testing all tables…</div>
    </div>`;
      overlay.classList.add('open');

      const tables = [
        'profiles','user_stats','conversations','messages','artifacts',
        'generated_code','generated_diagrams','generated_images',
        'user_query_log','user_sessions','user_events','user_preferences',
        'user_daily_metrics','platform_daily','user_auth_events',
        'user_memory','token_budgets','model_token_summary','file_uploads','error_log'
      ];

      const rows = await Promise.allSettled(tables.map(t =>
        sbSelect(t, '', 5, '')
      ));

      const html = `
    <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px">
      URL: <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--accent)">${SB_URL}</span><br>
      Key ends: <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--accent)">…${SB_KEY.slice(-8)}</span>
    </p>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px">
      ${tables.map((t, i) => {
        const r = rows[i];
        const ok = r.status === 'fulfilled';
        const cnt = ok ? (r.value?.length ?? 0) : 0;
        const err = !ok ? (r.reason?.message || 'error') : '';
        return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;border:1px solid ${ok?'var(--border)':'rgba(248,113,113,.25)'}">
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:${ok?'var(--text)':'var(--red)'}">${t}</span>
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:${ok?(cnt>0?'var(--green)':'var(--muted)'):'var(--red)'}">
            ${ok ? (cnt > 0 ? `✓ ${cnt} rows` : '✓ empty') : `✗ ${err.slice(0,70)}`}
          </span>
        </div>`;
      }).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">
      ✓ green = table exists with data &nbsp;|&nbsp; ✓ grey = table exists but empty &nbsp;|&nbsp; ✗ red = table missing or error
    </div>`;

      document.getElementById('diag-body').innerHTML = html;
    }

    // ── Overview ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderOverview() {
      const anyFailed = _fetchStatus.some(s => !s.ok);
      const totalData  = _fetchStatus.reduce((n, s) => n + s.count, 0);
      const statusHtml = _fetchStatus.length ? `
    <div style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid ${anyFailed?'rgba(248,113,113,.3)':totalData===0?'rgba(251,191,36,.3)':'var(--border)'};border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:20px">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px">
        <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:${anyFailed?'var(--red)':totalData===0?'#f59e0b':'var(--muted)'}">
          ${anyFailed ? '⚠ Some fetches failed' : totalData === 0 ? '⚠ Tables exist but all empty' : '✓ Data loaded'} — Source Status
        </span>
        <button type="button" class="btn-sm" onclick="runDiagnostic()" style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 10px">🔍 Full Diagnostic</button>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:3px">
        ${_fetchStatus.map(s => `
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 8px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:4px;font-size:10px">
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:${s.ok?'var(--text)':'var(--red)'}">${s.key}</span>
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);color:${s.ok?(s.count>0?'var(--green)':'var(--muted)'):'var(--red)'}">
            ${s.ok ? (s.count > 0 ? `${s.count}` : '0') : '✗ ' + (s.error||'err').slice(0,35)}
          </span>
        </div>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>` : '';

      const t = _platform[0] ?? {};
      const totalTokens = _users.reduce((s, u) => s + (u.lifetime_tokens ?? 0), 0);
      const totalMsgs   = _users.reduce((s, u) => s + (u.total_messages ?? 0), 0);
      const paid        = _users.filter(u => u.tier === 'pro' || u.tier === 'unlimited').length;
      const liveNow     = _users.filter(u => u.active_sessions > 0).length;
      const totalIn     = _users.reduce((s, u) => s + (u.total_input_tokens ?? 0), 0);
      const totalOut    = _users.reduce((s, u) => s + (u.total_output_tokens ?? 0), 0);

      return statusHtml + `
    <div class="stat-grid">
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Total Users</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(_users.length)}</div><div class="stat-sub">${paid} paid</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Online Now</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--green)">${liveNow}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Queries Today</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.k(t.total_queries ?? 0)}</div><div class="stat-sub">${t.active_users ?? 0} users</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Tokens Today</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--accent)">${fmt.k(t.total_tokens ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Total Messages</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.k(totalMsgs)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Lifetime Tokens</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.k(totalTokens)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Input Tokens</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.k(totalIn)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Output Tokens</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.k(totalOut)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Images Generated</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(_images.length)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Diagrams</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(_diagrams.length)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Code Files</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(_genCode.length)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Artifacts</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(_artifacts.length)}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-hdr">Today's Intent Breakdown</div>
    <div class="stat-grid">
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">💻 Coding</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.num(t.coding_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">🧠 Reasoning</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.num(t.reasoning_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">🔍 Live</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--green)">${fmt.num(t.live_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">💬 General</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(t.general_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">📄 Artifacts</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(t.artifacts_created ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">👍 Good</div><div class="stat-val good">${fmt.num(t.good_feedback ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">👎 Bad</div><div class="stat-val bad">${fmt.num(t.bad_feedback ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">↻ Regen</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(t.regenerations ?? 0)}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-hdr">Model Usage Today</div>
    <div class="stat-grid">
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Gemini</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--accent)">${fmt.num(t.gemini_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Claude</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.num(t.claude_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
      <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">OpenAI</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--green)">${fmt.num(t.openai_queries ?? 0)}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-hdr">Last 30 Days <span class="sec-count">${_platform.length}</span></div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Active Users</th><th>Queries</th><th>Tokens</th><th>Gemini</th><th>Claude</th><th>OpenAI</th><th>Coding</th><th>Reasoning</th><th>Live</th><th>Artifacts</th><th>👍</th><th>👎</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>${_platform.map(d => `<tr>
        <td class="mono">${d.date}</td>
        <td>${d.active_users||0}</td>
        <td>${fmt.k(d.total_queries||0)}</td>
        <td>${fmt.k(d.total_tokens||0)}</td>
        <td>${d.gemini_queries||0}</td>
        <td>${d.claude_queries||0}</td>
        <td>${d.openai_queries||0}</td>
        <td>${d.coding_queries||0}</td>
        <td>${d.reasoning_queries||0}</td>
        <td>${d.live_queries||0}</td>
        <td>${d.artifacts_created||0}</td>
        <td class="good">${d.good_feedback||0}</td>
        <td class="bad">${d.bad_feedback||0}</td>
      </tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    // ── Users ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderUsers() {
      return `
    <div class="toolbar">
      <input class="search" placeholder="Search email, country, tier…" value="${_userSearch}"
        oninput="_userSearch=this.value;document.getElementById('u-tbody').innerHTML=renderUserRows()" />
      <span class="mono sm">${_users.length} total users</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>Email</th><th>Tier</th><th>Status</th><th>Last Seen</th><th>Messages</th><th>In Tokens</th><th>Out Tokens</th><th>Total Tokens</th><th>Sessions</th><th>Avg Session</th><th>Coding</th><th>Live</th><th>Artifacts</th><th>Today</th><th>Streak</th><th>Timezone</th><th>Country</th><th>Device</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="u-tbody">${renderUserRows()}</tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    function renderUserRows() {
      const filtered = _users.filter(u =>
        !_userSearch || (u.email ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(_userSearch) ||
        (u.country ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(_userSearch) ||
        (u.tier ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(_userSearch)
      );
      return filtered.map(u => `<tr onclick='openUserModal("${u.user_id}")'>
      <td>
        ${u.active_sessions > 0 ? '<span style="color:var(--green);font-size:8px;margin-right:4px">●</span>' : ''}
        ${u.email ?? '—'}
        ${u.is_admin ? '<span class="badge" style="background:var(--alo);color:var(--accent);margin-left:5px">admin</span>' : ''}
      </td>
      <td><span style="color:${TIER_CLR[u.tier]??'var(--muted)'};font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase">${u.tier}</span></td>
      <td>${u.active_sessions > 0 ? '<span class="badge badge-online">● live</span>' : u.is_banned ? '<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--red)">banned</span>' : '<span class="badge badge-offline">offline</span>'}</td>
      <td class="sm mono">${fmt.ago(u.last_seen_at)}</td>
      <td>${fmt.k(u.total_messages)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.k(u.total_input_tokens)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.k(u.total_output_tokens)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--accent)">${fmt.k(u.lifetime_tokens)}</td>
      <td>${u.total_sessions}</td>
      <td>${fmt.mins(u.avg_session_minutes)}</td>
      <td>${u.total_code_requests}</td>
      <td>${u.total_live_requests}</td>
      <td>${u.total_artifacts}</td>
      <td class="${u.queries_today > 0 ? 'hi' : ''}">${u.queries_today > 0 ? u.queries_today : '—'}</td>
      <td class="mono">${(u.streak_days ?? 0)}d</td>
      <td class="sm">${u.timezone ?? '—'}</td>
      <td class="sm">${u.country ?? '—'}</td>
      <td class="sm">${u.device_type ?? '—'}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
    }

    // ── Conversations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderConvos() {
      const list = _convos.filter(c => !_search || (c.title ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(_search.toLowerCase()));
      return `
    <div class="toolbar">
      <input class="search" placeholder="Search chats…" value="${_search}"
        oninput="_search=this.value;renderTab('${_currentTab}')" />
      <span class="mono sm">${list.length} conversations</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>Title</th><th>User</th><th>Messages</th><th>Tokens</th><th>Model</th><th>Intent</th><th>Last Updated</th><th>Created</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${list.map(c => `<tr onclick="openChat('${c.id}','${esc(c.title||'New Chat')}')">
          <td><strong>${esc(c.title || 'New Chat')}</strong></td>
          <td class="sm">${_usersMap[c.user_id] || c.user_id || '—'}</td>
          <td>${c.message_count || 0}</td>
          <td class="mono sm">${fmt.k(c.total_tokens)}</td>
          <td class="sm">${c.model_used || c.preferred_model || 'auto'}</td>
          <td><span style="color:${INT_CLR[c.intent]??'var(--muted)'};font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase">${c.intent || '—'}</span></td>
          <td class="mono sm">${fmt.date(c.last_modified || c.updated_at)}</td>
          <td class="mono sm">${fmt.date(c.created_at)}</td>
        </tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    // ── Messages (recent global) ──────────────────────────────────────
    function renderMessages() {
      const list = _messages.filter(m => !_search ||
        (m.content ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(_search.toLowerCase()));
      return `
    <div class="toolbar">
      <input class="search" placeholder="Search message content…" value="${_search}"
        oninput="_search=this.value;renderTab('${_currentTab}')" />
      <span class="mono sm">${list.length} messages loaded</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>Time</th><th>User</th><th>Role</th><th>Content Preview</th><th>Model</th><th>In Tokens</th><th>Out Tokens</th><th>Latency</th><th>Feedback</th><th>Has Image</th><th>Has Docs</th><th>Has Artifact</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${list.map(m => `<tr onclick="openMsgDetail('${m.id}')">
          <td class="mono sm">${fmt.ago(m.timestamp || m.created_at)}</td>
          <td class="sm" style="max-width:140px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">${_usersMap[m.user_id || (window._convoUserMap||{})[m.conversation_id]] || '—'}</td>
          <td><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:${m.role==='user'?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)'};text-transform:uppercase">${m.role}</span></td>
          <td style="max-width:260px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:rgba(228,232,240,.7)">${esc((m.content||'').slice(0,100))}</td>
          <td class="sm">${shortModel(m.model || m.model_name)}</td>
          <td class="mono" style="color:var(--blue)">${m.input_tokens || 0}</td>
          <td class="mono" style="color:var(--purple)">${m.output_tokens || 0}</td>
          <td class="mono sm">${(m.response_time_ms || m.processing_time_ms) ? (m.response_time_ms || m.processing_time_ms)+'ms' : '—'}</td>
          <td>${m.feedback === 'good' ? '👍' : m.feedback === 'bad' ? '👎' : '—'}</td>
          <td>${m.image_data ? '<span style="color:var(--purple)">🖼️ yes</span>' : '—'}</td>
          <td>${m.documents ? '<span style="color:var(--blue)">📁 yes</span>' : '—'}</td>
          <td>${m.has_artifacts ? '<span style="color:var(--accent)">📄 yes</span>' : '—'}</td>
        </tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    // ── Queries ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderQueries() {
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">Recent Queries <span class="sec-count">${_queries.length}</span></div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>Time</th><th>User</th><th>Prompt (click for full)</th><th>Intent</th><th>Model</th><th>In</th><th>Out</th><th>Total</th><th>Latency</th><th>Feedback</th><th>Flags</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>${_queries.map(q => `<tr onclick="openQuery('${q.id}')">
        <td class="sm mono">${fmt.ago(q.created_at)}</td>
        <td class="sm" style="max-width:130px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">${q.email||_usersMap[q.user_id]||'—'}</td>
        <td style="max-width:220px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:rgba(228,232,240,.7)">${esc((q.prompt_text||'').slice(0,80))}${(q.prompt_text||'').length>80?'…':''}</td>
        <td><span style="color:${INT_CLR[q.intent]??'var(--muted)'};font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase">${q.intent??'—'}</span></td>
        <td class="sm">${shortModel(q.model_used)}</td>
        <td class="mono" style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.k(q.input_tokens)}</td>
        <td class="mono" style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.k(q.output_tokens)}</td>
        <td class="mono">${fmt.k(q.total_tokens)}</td>
        <td class="sm">${q.response_time_ms}ms</td>
        <td>${q.feedback==='good'?'👍':q.feedback==='bad'?'👎':'—'}</td>
        <td style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          ${q.had_error?'<span style="font-size:9px;background:rgba(248,113,113,.12);color:var(--red);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:var(--mono)">err</span>':''}
          ${q.artifact_created?'<span style="font-size:9px;background:rgba(74,222,128,.08);color:var(--green);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:var(--mono)">art</span>':''}
          ${q.was_regenerated?'<span style="font-size:9px;background:var(--alo);color:var(--accent);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:var(--mono)">regen</span>':''}
        </td>
      </tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    // ── Artifacts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderArtifacts() {
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">Artifacts <span class="sec-count">${_artifacts.length}</span></div>
    <div class="code-grid">
      ${_artifacts.map(a => `
      <div class="code-card" onclick="openArtifact('${a.id}')">
        <div class="code-card-hdr">
          <div>
            <div class="code-card-title">${esc(a.title||'Untitled')}</div>
            <div class="code-card-meta">${_usersMap[a.user_id]||'—'} · ${fmt.ago(a.created_at)} · ${a.line_count||0} lines</div>
          </div>
          <span class="lang-badge">${a.language||a.artifact_type||'—'}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="code-preview"><pre><code class="language-${a.language||'plaintext'}">${esc((a.content||'').slice(0,400))}</code></pre></div>
      </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
    }

    // ── Generated Code ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderGenCode() {
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">Generated Code Files <span class="sec-count">${_genCode.length}</span></div>
    <div class="code-grid">
      ${_genCode.map(g => `
      <div class="code-card" onclick="openGenCode('${g.id}')">
        <div class="code-card-hdr">
          <div>
            <div class="code-card-title">${esc(g.title||g.file_path||'Untitled')}</div>
            <div class="code-card-meta">${_usersMap[g.user_id]||'—'} · ${fmt.ago(g.created_at)} · ${g.line_count||0} lines</div>
          </div>
          <span class="lang-badge">${g.language||'—'}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="code-preview"><pre><code class="language-${g.language||'plaintext'}">${esc((g.code_content||'').slice(0,400))}</code></pre></div>
      </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
    }

    // ── Images ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderImages() {
      if (!_images.length) return '<div class="empty">No generated images found.</div>';
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">Generated Images <span class="sec-count">${_images.length}</span></div>
    <div class="img-grid">
      ${_images.map(img => {
        const src = img.base64_data
          ? `data:image/${img.image_format||'png'};base64,${img.base64_data}`
          : (img.image_url || img.url || '');
        return `
      <div class="img-card">
        ${src
          ? `<img class="img-card-thumb" src="${src}" alt="${esc(img.title||'Image')}" onclick="openLightbox('${src}')" loading="lazy" />`
          : `<div class="img-card-thumb-placeholder">🖼️</div>`}
        <div class="img-card-body">
          <div class="img-card-title">${esc(img.title||'Untitled Image')}</div>
          <div class="img-card-meta">${_usersMap[img.user_id]||'—'} · ${fmt.ago(img.created_at)}</div>
          ${img.prompt ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.4;max-height:36px;overflow:hidden">${esc(img.prompt.slice(0,80))}</div>` : ''}
          <div class="img-card-actions">
            ${src ? `<button class="img-action" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openLightbox('${src}')">🔍 View</button>` : ''}
            ${src ? `<button class="img-action" onclick="event.stopPropagation();copyText('${src.length > 200 ? 'data:base64 (too long to copy)' : src}')">📋 Copy</button>` : ''}
            ${img.image_url ? `<button class="img-action" onclick="event.stopPropagation();copyText('${img.image_url}')">🔗 URL</button>` : ''}
            <button class="img-action" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openImgDetail('${img.id}')">ℹ️</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      }).join('')}
    </div>`;
    }

    // ── Diagrams ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderDiagrams() {
      if (!_diagrams.length) return '<div class="empty">No diagrams found.</div>';
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">Generated Diagrams <span class="sec-count">${_diagrams.length}</span></div>
    <div class="diagram-grid">
      ${_diagrams.map((d, i) => `
      <div class="diagram-card">
        <div class="diagram-card-hdr">
          <div>
            <div class="diagram-card-title">${esc(d.title||'Untitled Diagram')}</div>
            <div class="diagram-card-meta">${_usersMap[d.user_id]||'—'} · ${fmt.ago(d.created_at)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="diagram-render">
          <div class="mermaid" id="mmd-${i}">${esc(d.mermaid_code||'')}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="diagram-code-toggle">
          <button class="btn-sm" onclick="toggleDiagramRaw(${i})" style="font-size:10px;padding:4px 10px">Show Code</button>
        </div>
        <div class="diagram-raw" id="diag-raw-${i}">${esc(d.mermaid_code||'')}</div>
      </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
    }

    function toggleDiagramRaw(i) {
      const el = document.getElementById(`diag-raw-${i}`);
      if (el) el.classList.toggle('show');
    }

    // ── Preferences ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderPreferences() {
      if (!_prefs.length) return '<div class="empty">No user preferences found.</div>';
      const THEME_COLORS = { dark:'#1e293b', light:'#f1f5f9', sedrex:'#020408', forest:'#052e16', ocean:'#0c2340', sunset:'#431407' };
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">User Preferences <span class="sec-count">${_prefs.length}</span></div>
    <div class="pref-grid">
      ${_prefs.map(p => `
      <div class="pref-card">
        <div class="pref-card-hdr">
          <div class="pref-email">${_usersMap[p.user_id]||p.user_id||'—'}</div>
          <div class="pref-theme-dot" style="background:${THEME_COLORS[p.theme]||'var(--bg3)'}; border:1px solid var(--border2)" title="Theme: ${p.theme||'default'}"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pref-rows">
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Theme</span><span>${p.theme||'default'}</span></div>
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Language</span><span>${p.language||'en'}</span></div>
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Response Format</span><span>${p.response_format||'markdown'}</span></div>
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Font Size</span><span>${p.font_size||'—'}</span></div>
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Notifications</span><span>${p.notifications_enabled?'on':'off'}</span></div>
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Auto-title</span><span>${p.auto_title!==false?'on':'off'}</span></div>
          <div class="pref-row"><span>Updated</span><span>${fmt.ago(p.updated_at)}</span></div>
        </div>
        ${p.custom_instructions ? `<div class="pref-instr" onclick="this.classList.toggle('expanded')">"${esc(p.custom_instructions)}"</div>` : ''}
      </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
    }

    // ── Events ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderEvents() {
      return `
    <div class="toolbar">
      <input class="search" placeholder="Filter by event type or user…" value="${_search}"
        oninput="_search=this.value;renderTab('${_currentTab}')" />
      <span class="mono sm">${_events.length} events</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-feed">
      ${_events.filter(e => !_search ||
          (e.event_type||'').toLowerCase().includes(_search.toLowerCase()) ||
          (_usersMap[e.user_id]||'').toLowerCase().includes(_search.toLowerCase())
        ).map(e => `
      <div class="event-row">
        <span class="event-time">${fmt.ago(e.created_at)}</span>
        <span class="event-type" style="color:${EVT_CLR[e.event_type]||'var(--accent)'}">${e.event_type||'—'}</span>
        <span class="event-user">${_usersMap[e.user_id]||e.user_id||'—'}</span>
        <span class="event-props">${e.properties ? esc(JSON.stringify(e.properties).slice(0,120)) : ''}</span>
      </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
    }

    // ── Sessions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderSessions() {
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">Recent Sessions <span class="sec-count">${_sessions.length}</span></div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>User</th><th>Status</th><th>Started</th><th>Duration</th><th>Messages</th><th>Tokens</th><th>Device</th><th>Browser</th><th>OS</th><th>Country</th><th>City</th><th>Timezone</th><th>Ended Reason</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>${_sessions.map(s => `<tr>
        <td class="sm" style="max-width:160px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">${_usersMap[s.user_id]||s.user_id||'—'}</td>
        <td>${s.is_active?'<span class="badge badge-online">● live</span>':'<span class="badge badge-offline">ended</span>'}</td>
        <td class="sm mono">${fmt.date(s.started_at)}</td>
        <td class="mono">${fmt.mins((s.duration_seconds||0)/60)}</td>
        <td>${s.messages_sent||0}</td>
        <td>${fmt.k(s.tokens_used)}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.device_type??'—'}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.browser??'—'}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.os??'—'}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.country??'—'}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.city??'—'}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.timezone??'—'}</td>
        <td class="sm">${s.ended_reason??'—'}</td>
      </tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    // ── Daily Metrics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderMetrics() {
      return `
    <div class="sec-hdr">User Daily Metrics <span class="sec-count">${_metrics.length}</span></div>
    <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>User</th><th>Queries</th><th>Messages</th><th>Total Tokens</th><th>Input</th><th>Output</th><th>Sessions</th><th>Active Min</th><th>Coding</th><th>Live</th><th>Artifacts</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>${_metrics.map(m => `<tr>
        <td class="mono">${m.date}</td>
        <td class="sm" style="max-width:140px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">${_usersMap[m.user_id]||'—'}</td>
        <td>${m.queries_made??0}</td>
        <td>${m.messages_sent??0}</td>
        <td style="color:var(--accent)">${fmt.k(m.total_tokens)}</td>
        <td style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.k(m.input_tokens)}</td>
        <td style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.k(m.output_tokens)}</td>
        <td>${m.sessions_count??0}</td>
        <td>${fmt.mins(m.active_minutes)}</td>
        <td>${m.coding_queries??0}</td>
        <td>${m.live_queries??0}</td>
        <td>${m.artifacts_created??0}</td>
      </tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
    </table></div>`;
    }

    // ── User Modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function openUserModal(userId) {
      _selectedUser = _users.find(u => u.user_id === userId);
      if (!_selectedUser) return;
      const u = _selectedUser;
      document.getElementById('m-avatar').textContent = (u.email?.[0] ?? '?').toUpperCase();
      document.getElementById('m-email').textContent = u.email ?? '—';
      document.getElementById('m-badges').innerHTML =
        `<span style="color:${TIER_CLR[u.tier]??'var(--muted)'};font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase">${u.tier}</span>` +
        (u.is_admin ? '<span class="badge" style="background:var(--alo);color:var(--accent)">admin</span>' : '') +
        (u.is_banned ? '<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--red)">banned</span>' : '') +
        (u.active_sessions > 0 ? '<span class="badge badge-online">● online</span>' : '');
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
      document.querySelectorAll('.modal-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.mtab === 'overview'));
      _currentModalTab = 'overview';
      renderModalTab('overview');

      // Prefetch everything for this user
      try {
        [_userQueries, _userSessions, _userImages, _userDiagrams, _userGenCode] = await Promise.all([
          sbSelect('user_query_log', `user_id=eq.${userId}`, 100, 'created_at.desc'),
          sbSelect('user_sessions',  `user_id=eq.${userId}`, 50,  'started_at.desc'),
          sbSelect('generated_images',    `user_id=eq.${userId}`, 100, 'created_at.desc'),
          sbSelect('generated_diagrams',  `user_id=eq.${userId}`, 50,  'created_at.desc'),
          sbSelect('generated_code',      `user_id=eq.${userId}`, 50,  'created_at.desc'),
        ]);
        _userPrefs = _prefs.find(p => p.user_id === userId) || null;
        if (_currentModalTab !== 'overview') renderModalTab(_currentModalTab);
      } catch {
        _userQueries = []; _userSessions = []; _userImages = [];
        _userDiagrams = []; _userGenCode = []; _userPrefs = null;
      }
    }

    function closeModal() {
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
    }

    function switchModalTab(tab) {
      _currentModalTab = tab;
      document.querySelectorAll('.modal-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.mtab === tab));
      renderModalTab(tab);
    }

    function renderModalTab(tab) {
      const body = document.getElementById('modal-body');
      const u = _selectedUser;
      if (!u) return;

      if (tab === 'overview') {
        body.innerHTML = `
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title">Identity & Device</div>
        <div class="det-grid">
          ${[
            ['User ID',      u.user_id],
            ['Signup',       fmt.date(u.signup_at)],
            ['Last Seen',    fmt.ago(u.last_seen_at)],
            ['First Msg',    fmt.ago(u.first_message_at)],
            ['Last Msg',     fmt.ago(u.last_message_at)],
            ['Timezone',     u.timezone ?? '—'],
            ['Country',      u.country ?? '—'],
            ['City',         u.city ?? '—'],
            ['Device',       u.device_type ?? '—'],
            ['Browser',      u.browser ?? '—'],
            ['Signup Via',   u.signup_source ?? 'email'],
            ['Stripe ID',    u.stripe_customer_id ?? '—'],
          ].map(([l,v]) => `<div class="det-item"><span>${l}</span><span>${esc(String(v))}</span></div>`).join('')}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title">Token Usage</div>
        <div class="stat-grid">
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Total Messages</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(u.total_messages)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">This Month</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(u.monthly_messages)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Input Tokens</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.k(u.total_input_tokens)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Output Tokens</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.k(u.total_output_tokens)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Lifetime Tokens</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--accent)">${fmt.k(u.lifetime_tokens)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Sessions</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(u.total_sessions)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Avg Session</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.mins(u.avg_session_minutes)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">Streak</div><div class="stat-val">${u.streak_days??0}d</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title">Activity Types</div>
        <div class="stat-grid">
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">💻 Coding</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--blue)">${fmt.num(u.total_code_requests)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">🧠 Reasoning</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--purple)">${fmt.num(u.total_reasoning_requests)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">🔍 Live</div><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--green)">${fmt.num(u.total_live_requests)}</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-lbl">📄 Artifacts</div><div class="stat-val">${fmt.num(u.total_artifacts)}</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
        return;
      }

      if (tab === 'queries') {
        if (!_userQueries.length) { body.innerHTML = '<div class="loading"><div class="spinner"></div>Loading queries…</div>'; return; }
        body.innerHTML = _userQueries.map(q => `
      <div class="q-item">
        <div class="q-top">
          <span style="color:${INT_CLR[q.intent]??'var(--muted)'};font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase">${q.intent??'—'}</span>
          <span class="sm mono">${shortModel(q.model_used)}</span>
          <span style="color:var(--blue);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px">↑${fmt.k(q.input_tokens)}</span>
          <span style="color:var(--purple);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px">↓${fmt.k(q.output_tokens)}</span>
          <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">${fmt.ago(q.created_at)}</span>
          ${q.feedback==='good'?'👍':q.feedback==='bad'?'👎':''}
          ${q.had_error?'<span style="font-size:9px;background:rgba(248,113,113,.12);color:var(--red);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px">err</span>':''}
          ${q.artifact_created?'<span style="font-size:9px;background:rgba(74,222,128,.08);color:var(--green);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px">art</span>':''}
        </div>
        <div class="q-prompt" style="color:var(--blue);opacity:.8"><strong>▶ INPUT:</strong> ${esc((q.prompt_text??'').slice(0,400))}${(q.prompt_text??'').length>400?'…':''}</div>
        <div class="q-bottom">
          <span>${q.response_time_ms||0}ms latency</span>
          <span style="color:var(--accent)">${fmt.k(q.total_tokens)} tokens total</span>
          ${q.slash_command?`<span style="color:var(--blue)">/${q.slash_command}</span>`:''}
          ${q.was_regenerated?'<span style="color:var(--accent)">regenerated</span>':''}
          ${q.has_image?'<span style="color:var(--purple)">🖼️ image</span>':''}
          ${q.has_documents?'<span style="color:var(--blue)">📁 docs</span>':''}
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
        return;
      }

      if (tab === 'sessions') {
        if (!_userSessions.length) { body.innerHTML = '<div class="loading"><div class="spinner"></div>Loading sessions…</div>'; return; }
        body.innerHTML = _userSessions.map(s => `
      <div class="q-item">
        <div class="q-top">
          ${s.is_active?'<span class="badge badge-online">● active now</span>':`<span class="sm">${fmt.ago(s.ended_at)}</span>`}
          <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600">${fmt.mins((s.duration_seconds||0)/60)}</span>
          <span class="sm">${s.device_type??'—'} · ${s.browser??'—'} · ${s.os??'—'}</span>
          ${s.country?`<span style="color:var(--accent);font-size:11px">${s.city?s.city+', ':''}${s.country}</span>`:''}
        </div>
        <div class="q-bottom">
          <span>${fmt.date(s.started_at)}</span>
          <span>${s.messages_sent} msgs</span>
          <span>${fmt.k(s.tokens_used)} tokens</span>
          ${s.ended_reason?`<span style="color:var(--red)">${s.ended_reason}</span>`:''}
          ${s.timezone?`<span>${s.timezone}</span>`:''}
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
        return;
      }

      if (tab === 'preferences') {
        const p = _userPrefs;
        if (!p) { body.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No preferences stored for this user.</div>'; return; }
        body.innerHTML = `
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title">Display & Theme</div>
        <div class="det-grid">
          ${[
            ['Theme', p.theme||'default'],
            ['Language', p.language||'en'],
            ['Response Format', p.response_format||'markdown'],
            ['Font Size', p.font_size||'—'],
            ['Compact Mode', p.compact_mode?'on':'off'],
            ['Auto-title Chats', p.auto_title!==false?'on':'off'],
            ['Sound Notifications', p.sound_enabled?'on':'off'],
            ['Notifications', p.notifications_enabled?'on':'off'],
            ['Last Updated', fmt.date(p.updated_at)],
          ].map(([l,v]) => `<div class="det-item"><span>${l}</span><span>${esc(String(v))}</span></div>`).join('')}
        </div>
      </div>
      ${p.custom_instructions ? `
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title" style="color:var(--blue)">Custom Instructions</div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6">${esc(p.custom_instructions)}</div>
      </div>` : ''}
      ${p.system_prompt ? `
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title" style="color:var(--purple)">System Prompt</div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6">${esc(p.system_prompt)}</div>
      </div>` : ''}
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title">Raw Preferences JSON</div>
        <pre style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;overflow-x:auto;white-space:pre-wrap">${esc(JSON.stringify(p, null, 2))}</pre>
      </div>`;
        return;
      }

      if (tab === 'images') {
        if (!_userImages.length) { body.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No images generated by this user.</div>'; return; }
        body.innerHTML = `<div class="img-grid">${_userImages.map(img => {
          const src = img.base64_data
            ? `data:image/${img.image_format||'png'};base64,${img.base64_data}`
            : (img.image_url || img.url || '');
          return `
        <div class="img-card">
          ${src
            ? `<img class="img-card-thumb" src="${src}" onclick="openLightbox('${src}')" loading="lazy" />`
            : `<div class="img-card-thumb-placeholder">🖼️</div>`}
          <div class="img-card-body">
            <div class="img-card-title">${esc(img.title||'Untitled')}</div>
            <div class="img-card-meta">${fmt.ago(img.created_at)}</div>
            ${img.prompt ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4">${esc(img.prompt.slice(0,80))}</div>` : ''}
            <div class="img-card-actions" style="margin-top:6px">
              ${src ? `<button class="img-action" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openLightbox('${src}')">🔍</button>` : ''}
              ${img.image_url ? `<button class="img-action" onclick="event.stopPropagation();copyText('${img.image_url}')">🔗 URL</button>` : ''}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>`;
        }).join('')}</div>`;
        return;
      }

      if (tab === 'diagrams') {
        if (!_userDiagrams.length) { body.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No diagrams generated by this user.</div>'; return; }
        body.innerHTML = `<div class="diagram-grid">${_userDiagrams.map((d, i) => `
        <div class="diagram-card">
          <div class="diagram-card-hdr">
            <div class="diagram-card-title">${esc(d.title||'Untitled Diagram')}</div>
            <div class="diagram-card-meta">${fmt.ago(d.created_at)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="diagram-render">
            <div class="mermaid" id="mmd-u-${i}">${esc(d.mermaid_code||'')}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="diagram-code-toggle">
            <button class="btn-sm" onclick="toggleRaw('diag-u-raw-${i}')" style="font-size:10px;padding:4px 10px">Show Code</button>
          </div>
          <div class="diagram-raw" id="diag-u-raw-${i}">${esc(d.mermaid_code||'')}</div>
        </div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        scheduleMermaid();
        return;
      }

      if (tab === 'gencode') {
        if (!_userGenCode.length) { body.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No code files generated by this user.</div>'; return; }
        body.innerHTML = `<div class="code-grid">${_userGenCode.map(g => `
        <div class="code-card" onclick="openGenCode('${g.id}')">
          <div class="code-card-hdr">
            <div>
              <div class="code-card-title">${esc(g.title||g.file_path||'Untitled')}</div>
              <div class="code-card-meta">${fmt.ago(g.created_at)} · ${g.line_count||0} lines</div>
            </div>
            <span class="lang-badge">${g.language||'—'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="code-preview"><pre><code class="language-${g.language||'plaintext'}">${esc((g.code_content||'').slice(0,400))}</code></pre></div>
        </div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        scheduleHljs();
        return;
      }
    }

    // ── Chat detail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function openChat(convId, title) {
      pushModal();
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">💬 ${title}</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="popModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="chat-body"><div class="loading"><div class="spinner"></div>Loading messages…</div></div>`;
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
      try {
        const msgs = await sbSelect('messages', `conversation_id=eq.${convId}`, 1000, 'timestamp.asc');
        if (!msgs.length) { document.getElementById('chat-body').innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No messages found.</div>'; return; }
        document.getElementById('chat-body').innerHTML = `<div class="chat-container">${msgs.map(m => {
          const isU = m.role === 'user';
          let docs = [];
          try { docs = m.documents ? JSON.parse(m.documents) : []; } catch { docs = []; }
          return `
        <div class="msg ${isU ? 'msg-user' : 'msg-assistant'}">
          <div class="msg-hdr">
            <strong style="color:${isU?'var(--blue)':'var(--green)'}">${isU ? 'USER' : 'SEDREX AI'}</strong>
            <span style="color:var(--muted)">${fmt.date(m.timestamp || m.created_at)}</span>
            ${m.model_name ? `<span style="color:var(--accent)">[${shortModel(m.model_name)}]</span>` : ''}
            ${m.intent ? `<span style="color:${INT_CLR[m.intent]??'var(--muted)'};text-transform:uppercase;font-size:9px">${m.intent}</span>` : ''}
            ${m.input_tokens ? `<span style="color:var(--blue);font-size:10px">↑${m.input_tokens}</span>` : ''}
            ${m.output_tokens ? `<span style="color:var(--purple);font-size:10px">↓${m.output_tokens}</span>` : ''}
          </div>
          <div class="msg-content">${esc(m.content || '')}</div>
          ${m.image_data ? `<img class="msg-image" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,${m.image_data}" onclick="openLightbox(this.src)" />` : ''}
          ${docs.length ? `<div class="msg-docs">${docs.map(d => `<div class="msg-doc">📁 ${esc(d.name||d)}</div>`).join('')}</div>` : ''}
          <div class="msg-meta">
            ${m.has_artifacts ? '<span class="badge" style="background:var(--alo);color:var(--accent)">📄 artifact</span>' : ''}
            ${m.tokens_used > 0 ? `<span class="badge badge-offline">${m.tokens_used} tokens</span>` : ''}
            ${m.processing_time_ms > 0 ? `<span class="badge badge-offline">${m.processing_time_ms}ms</span>` : ''}
            ${m.feedback === 'good' ? '<span class="badge badge-online">👍 liked</span>' : m.feedback === 'bad' ? '<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--red)">👎 disliked</span>' : ''}
          </div>
        </div>`;
        }).join('')}</div>`;
      } catch (e) { document.getElementById('chat-body').innerHTML = `<div class="loading" style="color:var(--red)">⚠ ${e.message}</div>`; }
    }

    // ── Message detail ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function openMsgDetail(msgId) {
      const m = _messages.find(x => x.id === msgId);
      if (!m) return;
      pushModal();
      const src = m.image_data ? `data:image/jpeg;base64,${m.image_data}` : '';
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">✉️ Message Detail</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="popModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="det-section"><div class="det-title">Metadata</div><div class="det-grid">
        ${[
          ['User', _usersMap[m.user_id]||m.user_id||'—'],
          ['Role', m.role],
          ['Model', shortModel(m.model_name)],
          ['Intent', m.intent||'—'],
          ['Input Tokens', m.input_tokens||0],
          ['Output Tokens', m.output_tokens||0],
          ['Total Tokens', m.tokens_used||0],
          ['Latency', m.processing_time_ms ? m.processing_time_ms+'ms' : '—'],
          ['Feedback', m.feedback||'none'],
          ['Timestamp', fmt.date(m.timestamp||m.created_at)],
        ].map(([l,v]) => `<div class="det-item"><span>${l}</span><span>${esc(String(v))}</span></div>`).join('')}
      </div></div>
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title" style="color:var(--blue)">Content</div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6;word-break:break-word">${esc(m.content||'')}</div>
      </div>
      ${src ? `<div class="det-section"><div class="det-title" style="color:var(--purple)">Attached Image</div><img src="${src}" style="max-width:100%;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer" onclick="openLightbox('${src}')" /></div>` : ''}
    </div>`;
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
    }

    // ── Query detail ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function openQuery(queryId) {
      const q = _queries.find(x => x.id === queryId);
      if (!q) return;
      pushModal();
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">⚡ Query Detail</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="popModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="det-section"><div class="det-title">Metadata</div><div class="det-grid">
        ${[
          ['User', q.email||_usersMap[q.user_id]||'—'],
          ['Model', shortModel(q.model_used)],
          ['Intent', q.intent||'—'],
          ['Status', q.had_error ? '❌ Error' : '✅ Success'],
          ['Input Tokens', q.input_tokens||0],
          ['Output Tokens', q.output_tokens||0],
          ['Total Tokens', q.total_tokens||0],
          ['Latency', q.response_time_ms ? q.response_time_ms+'ms' : '—'],
          ['Feedback', q.feedback||'none'],
          ['Artifact Created', q.artifact_created ? 'yes' : 'no'],
          ['Regenerated', q.was_regenerated ? 'yes' : 'no'],
          ['Time', fmt.date(q.created_at)],
        ].map(([l,v]) => `<div class="det-item"><span>${l}</span><span>${esc(String(v))}</span></div>`).join('')}
      </div></div>
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title" style="color:var(--blue)">▶ Input Prompt</div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6;word-break:break-word">${esc(q.prompt_text||'')}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="det-section">
        <div class="det-title" style="color:var(--green)">◀ AI Response Output</div>
        <div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid rgba(74,222,128,.15);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6;word-break:break-word" id="qr-response-text">Loading response from messages…</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');

      // Load AI response from messages table (user_query_log.message_id links to it)
      if (q.message_id || q.conversation_id) {
        try {
          let respMsg = null;
          if (q.message_id) {
            const msgs = await sbSelect('messages', `id=eq.${q.message_id}`, 1);
            respMsg = msgs[0];
          } else if (q.conversation_id) {
            // Fetch the assistant message closest to this query's timestamp
            const msgs = await sbSelect('messages',
              `conversation_id=eq.${q.conversation_id}&role=eq.assistant`, 5, 'timestamp.desc');
            respMsg = msgs[0];
          }
          const el = document.getElementById('qr-response-text');
          if (el) el.textContent = respMsg?.content || '(response message not found)';
        } catch { /* silently skip */ }
      } else {
        const el = document.getElementById('qr-response-text');
        if (el) el.textContent = '(no message_id — full prompt is stored in messages table)';
      }
    }

    // ── Artifact detail ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    function openArtifact(artId) {
      const art = _artifacts.find(a => a.id === artId);
      if (!art) return;
      pushModal();
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">📄 ${esc(art.title||'Artifact')}</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="popModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" style="padding:0">
      <div style="padding:10px 16px;background:var(--bg3);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--muted)">
        <span>${_usersMap[art.user_id]||'—'}</span>
        <span style="color:var(--blue)">${art.language||'—'}</span>
        <span>${art.artifact_type||'—'}</span>
        <span>${art.line_count||0} lines</span>
        <span>${fmt.date(art.created_at)}</span>
        <span>${art.file_path||''}</span>
      </div>
      <pre style="margin:0;overflow:auto;max-height:65vh"><code class="language-${art.language||'plaintext'}">${esc(art.content||'')}</code></pre>
    </div>`;
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
      scheduleHljs();
    }

    // ── Generated code detail ─────────────────────────────────────────
    function openGenCode(codeId) {
      const g = _genCode.find(x => x.id === codeId) || _userGenCode.find(x => x.id === codeId);
      if (!g) return;
      pushModal();
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">💻 ${esc(g.title||g.file_path||'Code')}</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="popModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" style="padding:0">
      <div style="padding:10px 16px;background:var(--bg3);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--muted)">
        <span>${_usersMap[g.user_id]||'—'}</span>
        <span style="color:var(--blue)">${g.language||'—'}</span>
        <span>${g.line_count||0} lines</span>
        <span>${g.file_path||''}</span>
        <span>${fmt.date(g.created_at)}</span>
      </div>
      <pre style="margin:0;overflow:auto;max-height:65vh"><code class="language-${g.language||'plaintext'}">${esc(g.code_content||'')}</code></pre>
    </div>`;
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
      scheduleHljs();
    }

    // ── Image detail ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function openImgDetail(imgId) {
      const img = _images.find(x => x.id === imgId);
      if (!img) return;
      const src = img.base64_data
        ? `data:image/${img.image_format||'png'};base64,${img.base64_data}`
        : (img.image_url || img.url || '');
      pushModal();
      document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-hdr">
      <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700">🖼️ ${esc(img.title||'Image Detail')}</div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="popModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      ${src ? `<img src="${src}" style="max-width:100%;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;cursor:pointer" onclick="openLightbox('${src}')" />` : ''}
      <div class="det-section"><div class="det-title">Metadata</div><div class="det-grid">
        ${[
          ['User', _usersMap[img.user_id]||'—'],
          ['Title', img.title||'—'],
          ['Format', img.image_format||'—'],
          ['Width', img.width||'—'],
          ['Height', img.height||'—'],
          ['Session', img.session_id||'—'],
          ['Created', fmt.date(img.created_at)],
        ].map(([l,v]) => `<div class="det-item"><span>${l}</span><span>${esc(String(v))}</span></div>`).join('')}
      </div></div>
      ${img.prompt ? `<div class="det-section"><div class="det-title" style="color:var(--blue)">Generation Prompt</div><div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6">${esc(img.prompt)}</div></div>` : ''}
      ${img.image_url ? `<div class="det-section"><div class="det-title">Image URL</div><div style="background:var(--bg3);padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;word-break:break-all;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">${esc(img.image_url)}<button class="btn-sm" onclick="copyText('${img.image_url}')" style="margin-left:8px;flex-shrink:0">Copy</button></div></div>` : ''}
    </div>`;
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
    }

    // ── Modal stack helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────
    function pushModal() {
      _savedModalHtml = document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML;
    }

    function popModal() {
      const overlay = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');
      if (_savedModalHtml) {
        document.querySelector('#main-modal').innerHTML = _savedModalHtml;
        _savedModalHtml = '';
      } else {
        overlay.classList.remove('open');
      }
    }

    // ── Lightbox ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function openLightbox(src) {
      document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = src;
      document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
    }

    function closeLightbox() {
      document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
    }

    // ── Mermaid & hljs ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function scheduleMermaid() {
      setTimeout(() => {
        try {
          mermaid.run({ querySelector: '.mermaid' });
        } catch (e) { console.warn('mermaid render error:', e); }
      }, 50);
    }

    function scheduleHljs() {
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (window.hljs) hljs.highlightAll();
      }, 50);
    }

    function toggleRaw(id) {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) el.classList.toggle('show');
    }

    // ── Utilities ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function esc(s) {
      return String(s ?? '').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;');
    }

    function shortModel(m) {
      if (!m) return '—';
      return m.replace('Google Gemini','Gemini').replace('Anthropic Claude','Claude').replace('OpenAI GPT-4','GPT-4').replace('OpenAI','OAI');
    }

    async function copyText(text) {
      try {
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
        // Quick flash
        const el = document.createElement('div');
        el.textContent = '✓ Copied!';
        Object.assign(el.style, {
          position:'fixed', bottom:'24px', right:'24px', background:'var(--accent)', color:'#000',
          padding:'8px 16px', borderRadius:'8px', fontWeight:'700', fontSize:'13px',
          fontFamily:'var(--mono)', zIndex:'999', animation:'modal-in 200ms ease'
        });
        document.body.appendChild(el);
        setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 1800);
      } catch { alert('Copy failed. Text:\n\n' + text.slice(0, 500)); }
    }

    function closeModal() {
      document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
      _savedModalHtml = '';
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>

FILE: services\agents\agentOrchestrator.ts
MODIFIED: 2026-03-28 14:51  SIZE: 11967 bytes
